title: After you apply for a visitor visa - Canada.ca
content:
- Your fingerprints and photo (biometrics)
- Processing your visitor visa application
- Check your application status
- If we approve your application
- If we refuse your application

## Your fingerprints and photo (biometrics)
Book your biometrics collection appointment as soon as you can to avoid processing delays.
Find out how to give biometrics

## Processing your visitor visa application
We’ll check your application to make sure you have all the documents you need.
If it's incomplete, your application may be refused.
We may also ask you to
- go to an interview with our officials in your country
- send more information
- get a police certificate
We’ll tell you what to do if you need to do any of these.
We process most applications in a few weeks or less. Processing times depend on the visa office and if you need to do any extra steps (listed above).
Foreign nationals living in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, South Sudan and Uganda can’t travel to Canada as of May 27, 2026.
Find out more about these measures

## Check your application status
The way to check your application status depends on how you applied. Find out how to check your application status .

## If we approve your application
You’ll get a letter in your IRCC account with instructions to submit your passport.
You can’t travel to Canada until we put the visa in the passport you submit to us.
You should submit the same passport that you provided in your application. If you submit a newer passport
- it may delay the processing of your application
- it doesn’t mean that you’ll get a visa with longer validity An officer will decide when your visa will expire, depending on your circumstances.
- An officer will decide when your visa will expire, depending on your circumstances.
When your application is approved, any original documents, including your passport with the visa inside, will be returned to you.

## If we refuse your application
You’ll get our decision in your IRCC account. This will explain why we refused your application.
An explanation of why your application was refused will be sent to you, along with any original documents, including your passport.

## Help us improve our services
We’re looking for people to try out our products. Find out how you can participate .
